title: 10 of 12 pairs have holes after 2-3 wears
body: I have bought a total of 12 pairs of Viasox from November 2023 to January 2024. And so far 10 pairs have holes in the toes. That is after only wearing them 2-3 times at the most. When I contacted Viasox they only want to replace 3 pairs, but they want me to pay for shipping which is more then the socks are worth. Do not purchase from this company they do not stand behind their product.

title: Socks huge, fall down constantly, no customer service
body: I should've listened to the other bad reviews. The socks are HUGE. My husband wears a size 12 and his heel was halfway up his ankle. They fall down constantly. Customer service is nonexistent. Don't waste your money.

title: Return request sent 5 emails, no response after 3 weeks
body: I received my order of 6 pairs of socks on Feb 2, 2024. I tried on one pair, and they did not fit properly, so I immediately requested a return authorization. I received an automated reply that someone would get back to me in 24-48 hours. When I didn't hear from them, I sent a follow up email on Feb 6th, Feb 11th, Feb 14th, and Feb 20th. I have not received a reply from any of my emails. I have followed the return policy on their website, and I have not received any communication about how to return my order for a refund.

title: Not actually non-binding, leave deep ridges, fall down
body: I bought 6 pairs of these socks. They are supposed to be non binding. They leave deep ridges in my legs. I emailed the company about this and the fact that they don't stay up. They just slide down your leg. The company said that is just the way the socks are made. They are supposed to be non binding for diabetics. They are not. A total waste of my money.
personas: The Chronic Joint & Swelling Condition Buyer

title: Incredibly thin, no cushion for diabetic foot
body: These socks are incredibly thin. They would not provide any cushion for a diabetic foot. If you are looking for a sock for a diabetic, this is not it. It would not protect your feet at all. They are so thin you can practically see through them. I am very disappointed. For the price, I expected a much better quality sock.
personas: The Chronic Joint & Swelling Condition Buyer

title: No compression at all, loose dress socks, bunch up in shoes
body: The socks do not provide any compression at all. They are simply dress socks and loose fitting at that. They bunch up in my shoes and are very uncomfortable. They were a total waste of money. Also I was charged sales tax on my purchase even though clothing is not taxed in my state (Pennsylvania).

title: Sizing chart wrong, heel halfway up ankle, fall down
body: I'm very disappointed in these socks. I checked the sizing chart before I ordered. According to the chart I needed XL. I wear a size 12 shoe. The heel of the sock comes half way up my ankle. Also, they don't stay up. The fall down and bunch up on my ankle. They may be non-binding, but what good is that if they don't stay up?
